input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported failure is caused by tests using constructor signatures that do not match Maven Artifact 2.0.7, not by missing setup.

Tests that invoke full Maven build execution may read user settings/local repository or attempt repository/plugin resolution; prefer isolated component/resource/diagnoser coverage unless the generated test explicitly controls those paths.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is required before meaningful coverage is reachable for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; the artifact resolves its Maven 2.0.7 core, Plexus, Wagon, ClassWorlds, and resource dependencies transitively, and existing meaningful coverage patterns exercise CLI/version resources, diagnosers, and core constants without external services.
